nasb.text: nor did we seek glory from men, either from you or from others, even though as apostles of Christ we might have asserted our authority.

esv.text: Nor did we seek glory from people, whether from you or from others, though we could have made demands as apostles of Christ.

ccb.text: 我们不求得到你们或其他任何人的赞扬。

csbs.text: 无论向你们或向其他人，我们也都没有寻求从人来的荣耀。
